settings.heading: Delivery & Returns
settings.content: Shipping and returns can be inserted here.

settings.text_2EdJn22DkLvGeO0d: Our expert technicians specialize in bringing your beloved 35mm and medium format cameras back to life. Every repair begins with a comprehensive $50 bench fee inspection—this non-refundable fee covers our technician's time to thoroughly assess your camera and is applied toward your final repair cost.
settings.text_RNFrKrDOBylfVupG:
You can buy a shipping label directly through our on-site label system.

Just purchaase the inspection fee, then head to our Service Portal to purchase a label for your item. The label includes everything we need to identify your repair—no notes or paperwork required in the box.

Pack it up, drop it off with your local carrier, and you’re all set.

Once repairs are complete, we'll ship your camera back via your preferred method. Local drop-off is also available at our Grand Street location.

Don't have a printer? We can mail you your label for $5, just send us a message!
settings.text_LAR7XzAxYdi1hiqv: Your bench fee includes a complete diagnostic inspection, detailed assessment report, and a repair estimate. We'll identify all issues with your cameraand provide transparent pricing before proceeding with any repairs.
settings.text_XIsREF9c7JSG4r1B: We repair a wide arrange of cameras. Please see our whole list below
settings.text_6oBkAs9gGhCi9a2P: View our whole FAQ below! Don't see an answer? Give us a shout. We are open every day 11am to 8pm eastern
settings.text_67lEfP3mCupfbm20: Complete our online form with your camera details above, describe the issues you're experiencing, and upload photos if available.
settings.text_gLrpFrfQYV2GUV06: Pack your camera securely and ship it to our workshop. Labels are easily purchased via our service portal. Ensure you pack your camera well!
settings.text_YvaNqxr7rsECtqme: Our technician performs a comprehensive diagnostic assessment of your camera. This $50 inspection fee is applied toward your final repair cost.
settings.text_LpYIq39dkqMkvC9g: We'll contact you with a detailed breakdown of what needs to be repaired and the associated costs. No work proceeds until you approve the estimate.
settings.text_zIHeuZ4IaFTKxLNC: Once approved, our skilled technicians perform the necessary repairs using quality parts and time-tested techniques honed over years of film camera expertise.
settings.text_uhP281LIu4az2VxX: Your camera undergoes thorough testing to ensure everything functions perfectly. We then carefully pack and ship it back to you, ready for your next roll of film.
settings.text_nsHGXN0PI3XSWcih: We are actively expanding our menu. If you don't see your camera listed in the menu above you can book it through Unlisted to still get a quote. If you want to check if we can service it first, you can message our tehcnicians
settings.text_nSvnmtcQ01027Xj7: Enjoy peace of mind with our product's UVA and UVB protection, ensuring your skin is shielded from harmful sun rays all day long.
settings.text_4V3mnOu74Winkojf: Long-lasting protection that works for up to 8 hours, keeping you protected and comfortable throughout your busy day.
settings.text_xj27KEgUVzPLcNGZ: Dive into any activity with confidence—our waterproof formula ensures your protection won't wash away.
settings.text_fpHh06dolmevW9rt: Enjoy peace of mind with our product's UVA and UVB protection, ensuring your skin is shielded from harmful sun rays all day long.
settings.text_wTI1WAcR4j4D1JgN: Designed with convenience in mind, our product is compact and travel-friendly, making it easy to take with you wherever you go.
settings.text_OanafuXt1OjroSZu: Light seals can be done on all models
settings.text_ZjVPrYjV4ny7YV5h: Most mechanical cameras we can perform unjam and stuck shutter repairs.
settings.text_rgCiunvUGsyflbjz: Model & Part dependent but many mechanical models point & shoots can have the doors replaced
settings.text_IO0SzTfLrMc9Hmjy: Enjoy peace of mind with our product's UVA and UVB protection, ensuring your skin is shielded from harmful sun rays all day long.
settings.text_GFGnDjbsSg1sSZmu: Designed with convenience in mind, our product is compact and travel-friendly, making it easy to take with you wherever you go.
settings.text_K5rgZXTlX3nGlRJF: There is a vast array of other issues we can solve. Select other camera, or contact us!
settings.text_tX5jvewh0rqW2AIv: Every camera is unique, so all repairs are quote-based after our bench inspection. Below are example price ranges to help you plan. Your actual quote may vary based on your camera's specific condition and required parts.
settings.text_9eTXhF2Jl59s8a6I: Everything you need to know about our camera repair service. Can't find your answer? Reach out to our team directly.
settings.text_yPOfQDQyudoffbEH: What is the $50 bench fee and is it refundable?
settings.text_DyX1AepcieaXngSX: The $50 bench fee is a non-refundable inspection charge that covers our technician's time to thoroughly assess your camera. This fee is applied toward your final repair cost if you proceed with the repair. If repairs aren't possible due to any reason, the bench fee still cannot be refunded.
settings.text_ENPmwIUdsO9w8ai3: Standard repair turnaround is 2–4 weeks from when we receive your camera. Complex repairs or situations requiring special parts may take longer. We do not guarantee any timeframe as multiple factors go into repair times.
settings.text_1YqXpD4kvhmSlv9K: We specialize in 35mm and medium format film cameras including Canon, Nikon, Pentax, Olympus, Minolta, Contax, Leica, Hasselblad, Mamiya, Bronica, Rolleiflex, Yashica, and so many more! If you're unsure whether we service your camera model, contact us before submitting a repair request.
settings.text_nKyOLcNCxQ9BU6Lx: Polaroid cameras require specialized service. Please visit our dedicated Polaroid Repairs page for information on instant camera repair options and pricing.
settings.text_9SpfQZ8nomRE73wp: How should I pack my camera for shipping?
settings.text_Ek5DbpeAU9rLi2mh: Wrap your camera in bubble wrap or foam padding and place it in a sturdy box with additional packing material to prevent movement. Remove batteries and any detachable lenses (pack separately if sending).
settings.text_ReexIItutqMaLTuP: Will I receive a quote before any work is done?
settings.text_U5chG9FSxzdJdnk9: Absolutely. After the bench inspection, we'll contact you with a detailed quote outlining all recommended repairs and costs. No repair work proceeds until you approve the estimate. You can decline the repair, though the bench fee is non-refundable.
settings.text_Xqgk9OZXuw21n0iY: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and Shop Pay. The bench fee is collected when you submit your repair request. The remaining balance is due upon recieving the quote.
settings.text_QNSMFgbyON2JQ9sv: Can I drop off my camera in person?
settings.text_FAZaZxa8kpRb1gbS: Yes! Local customers can drop off and pick up cameras at our Brooklyn location: 855 Grand St, Brooklyn. Please submit your repair request online first, then drop off your camera any day we are open.
settings.text_9RZitkmjBUPjFcoq:
Getting your camera to us has never been easier. No more complicated forms, notes, or fears of loosing it - simply buy a label on our portal and get a label instantly.

Your camera is handled with the utmost care throughout the repair process. We photograph every camera upon arrival to document its condition. Return shipping options include USPS Priority, UPS Ground, or expedited services. Local Brooklyn customers can arrange pickup at our Grand Street location. All shipments are fully insured for your peace of mind.
